case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. EUGENE BEGADON et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Melanie Gheno #7489.

Thomas A.E. Hesketh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as successor by merger to Washington Mutual Bank.
No appearance by defendants Eugene Begadon, individually and dba Begadon Welding and Fabrication or Eugene Begadon, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on October 13, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as successor by merger to Washington Mutual Bank, and against defendants Eugene Begadon, individually and dba Begadon Welding and Fabrication and Eugene Begadon, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,412.62.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,447.17.
Attorney Fees - $750.00.
Costs - $660.05, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,269.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Continued To Jan-21-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Continued To Dec-03-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
